= [[Gene Simulation]] =
Icons for [[Gene Simulation]] displayed using [[:Template:RewardIconGeneSegment]].

== DNA Gene Segments ==
{{RewardIconWithText|DNA Gene Segment}}

* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Heimdall}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|MAFB}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|NF}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Titanian}}

=== [[Fissure Shop]] Gene Segments ===
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Belrog}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Cave Lord}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Copperbeard}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Earth Dragon}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Evil Omen}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Gulpetal Tyrant}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Headless Rider}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Mammoth}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Mantis Monk}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Seer Beetle}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Skulllizard}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Skullord}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Smilodon}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Tsarjaw}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Underground King}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Venustoad}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|White Demon}}

== [[Organs]] Gene Segments ==
{{RewardIconWithText|Original Gene Segment}}

* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Original}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Fatedrake}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Frostaurowa}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Hell Pincereign}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Ocean Coralith}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Skynet-T}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Storm Sandworm}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Venomark Slug}}


* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Xenking}}

== Purple DNA Gene Segments ==
{{RewardIconWithText|Purple DNA Gene Segment}}

* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Biochem Man}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Flying Man}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|No.0}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Ultimate Virus Trial}}


== Form DNA Gene Segments ==
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Angel}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Demon}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Mecha}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Mutant}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Zombie}}


* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Dragon}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Dragon Evolution Gene}}

== Misc Gene Segments ==
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Alien}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Ancient Apostle}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Bogenian Trial}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Bone Demon}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Book Demon}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Dark Pike Demon}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Flarken}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Frankenstein}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|HE Creature}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|HIV}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Huge Seahorse}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Koi Dragon}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Kun-Peng}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Kungfu Rat}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Meat Chef}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Mutated Gecko}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Pulao II}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Rainbow Pig's}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Rotten Merman}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Sealed Beast}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Space Pirate}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Subject Draco}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Succubus}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Super Slug}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Swarm Dragon}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Tracker 2000}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Ultimate Lifeform}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Urvogel}}
* {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Yazi II}}

= Icon Examples =
Icons for [[Gene Simulation]] displayed using [[:Template:IconExampleRowWithLink]].

== DNA Gene Segments ==
{{RewardIconWithText|DNA Gene Segment}}

{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|DNA Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Heimdall Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|MAFB Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|NF Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Titanian Gene Segment}}
|}

=== [[Fissure Shop]] Gene Segments ===
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Belrog Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Cave Lord Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Copperbeard Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Earth Dragon Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Evil Omen Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Gulpetal Tyrant Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Headless Rider Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Mammoth Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Mantis Monk Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Seer Beetle Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Skulllizard Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Skullord Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Smilodon Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Tsarjaw Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Underground King Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Venustoad Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|White Demon Gene Segment}}
|}

== [[Organs]] Gene Segments ==
{{RewardIconWithText|Original Gene Segment}}

{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Original Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Fatedrake Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Frostaurowa Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Hell Pincereign Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Ocean Coralith Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Skynet-T Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Storm Sandworm Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Venomark Slug Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Xenking Gene Segment}}
|}

== Purple DNA Gene Segments ==
{{RewardIconWithText|Purple DNA Gene Segment}}

{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Purple DNA Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Biochem Man Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Flying Man Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|No.0 Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Ultimate Virus Trial}}
|}

== Form DNA Gene Segments ==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Angel Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Demon Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Mecha Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Mutant Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Zombie Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleSpacer}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Dragon Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Dragon Evolution Gene}}
|}

== Misc Gene Segments ==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Alien Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Ancient Apostle Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Bogenian Trial}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Bone Demon Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Book Demon Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Dark Pike Demon Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Flarken Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Frankenstein Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|HE Creature Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|HIV Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Huge Seahorse Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Koi Dragon Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Kun-Peng Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Kungfu Rat Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Meat Chef Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Mutated Gecko Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Pulao II Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Rainbow Pig's Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Rotten Merman Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Sealed Beast Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Space Pirate Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Subject Draco Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Succubus Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Super Slug Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Swarm Dragon Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Tracker 2000 Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Ultimate Lifeform Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Urvogel Gene Segment}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Yazi II Gene Segment}}
|}

[[Category:Icons]]
